description.unified: For 8 sec, increases the ATK of all allies by [252->302], Attack Speed by 10%, and Physical DEF by 91 for 8sec.
Every 1 sec, increases ATK by [16->10], Status Resistance by 10, and damage dealt to non-hero enemies by 1%. This effect stacks up to [20->30] times.

IV.unified: Status Resistance increases by [30->10] for each stack.

description.unified: [Smash] reduces the target's ATK by 25% and increases the P.DMG they take by {0}% for 10 sec.
[Battle Roar] Reduces Mana Cost by 1 and increases targets Crit DMG by {0}% for the duration of Skill.
[Vortex] increases DMG by {0}%, and its last hit increases the P.DMG the target takes by {1}% for 10 Sec.
